theory.canonical_statement: ID 498 provides the bridge to Volume 02. It summarizes the successful integration of the **Tripartite Information Architecture** and the **Furiene Turbine** hardware. This review confirms that the system is ready for "External Field Deployment," transitioning from a controlled laboratory singularity to a global energy and information network. Readiness Audit: Final check of all 500 IDs against the Wess Zumino Witten topological action. Volume 02 Vectoring: Sets the initial coordinates for the Global Grid Interface (ID 500).

Readiness Audit: Final check of all 500 IDs against the Wess Zumino Witten topological action. Volume 02 Vectoring: Sets the initial coordinates for the Global Grid Interface (ID 500).
